{{Quote|These sky mines, they fill the sky with fire and death…I must have more.|[[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]]|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>}}
'''Imperial Atmospheric Explosive''' was a [[Mine/Legends|mine]] produced by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] and used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

The mine drifted through the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], guided by [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]], which would home the mine into any enemy craft detected. The mine pursued the target with an advanced tracking system and [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]], closing to lethal range before detonating. It was fitted with an ion cannon to disable the ships it was chasing. The Imperial Atmospheric Explosive had an effective blast range of thirty meters.

==Behind the scenes==
While the heading on the top of the page in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' labels this weapon as the Imperial Atmospheric Explosive, the component diagram at the bottom of the page depicts the weapon having an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]], with no mention of the repulsorlift system mentioned in the body of the article.
